catalogCategories.title: Pleated Depth Cartridges
catalogCategories.description: Pleated depth filter cartridges designed for high dirt-holding capacity and efficient particulate removal across pharmaceutical, chemical, water treatment, and industrial applications.

products.title: PP-Series
products.summary: High purity pleated polypropylene filter cartridge designed to remove fine and coarse particulates from liquid streams. Its 100% polypropylene construction provides excellent chemical compatibility and strong dirt-holding capacity.

products.title: PPE-Series
products.summary: Economy grade pleated polypropylene cartridge providing reliable particulate removal with thermally bonded media for durability, cleanliness, and chemical resistance.

products.title: GHLS-Series
products.summary: Lofted pleated polypropylene cartridge designed for high contaminant loading and viscous liquids, delivering high dirt-holding capacity without restricting flow.

products.title: FG-Series
products.summary: Pleated borosilicate microglass filter cartridge offering high-efficiency particulate removal, low pressure drop, and extended service life for process liquids.

products.title: FGE-Series
products.summary: Economy grade pleated microglass cartridge designed for nominal filtration in water and industrial process liquids while maintaining reliable throughput.

products.title: LiquidClear™ GF-Series
products.summary: Pleated synthetic depth media cartridge constructed from 100% synthetic fibers with no binders or adhesives, providing excellent dirt-holding capacity and low pressure drop.

products.title: WCPES-Series
products.summary: Value-oriented PES membrane cartridge designed for cost-effective general purpose membrane filtration with strong wet-out and competitive performance.

products.title: GGPES-Series
products.summary: General grade polyethersulfone membrane cartridge designed for cost-effective liquid filtration with low pressure loss and long service life.

products.title: GEPES-Series

products.title: GFPES-Series
products.type: Food & Beverage Grade PES Membrane Cartridge
products.summary: Food and beverage grade PES membrane cartridge designed to protect organoleptic properties while delivering high flux and low protein binding.

products.title: GBPES-Series
products.type: Wine & Beverage Grade PES Membrane Cartridge
products.summary: Wine and beverage grade PES membrane cartridge optimized for consumable production with strong extractables control and repeated sanitization capability.

products.title: GDPES-Series

products.title: GSPES-Series
products.summary: Serial-layer PES cartridge designed for clarification of particulate-heavy solutions with strong throughput and protection for downstream sterilizing stages.

products.title: BRPES-Series
products.summary: Validated bio-burden reduction grade PES membrane cartridge designed for removal of small particles and microbial contaminants in critical liquid processes.

products.title: PPES-Series
products.summary: Pharmaceutical grade PES membrane cartridge designed for sterile filtration and clarification of valuable pharmaceutical and biological solutions.

products.title: GGHNY / GGHNY+ Series
products.summary: General grade nylon 6,6 membrane cartridge with optional positively charged Plus+ surface for improved retention of haze, color bodies, and endotoxins.

products.title: GEHNY / GEHNY+ Series
products.summary: Electronics grade nylon membrane cartridge designed for ultra-pure water and high purity microelectronics applications with low extractables and quick rinse-up.

products.title: GFHNY / GFHNY+ Series
products.type: Food & Beverage Grade Nylon Membrane Cartridge
products.summary: Food and beverage grade nylon membrane cartridge with proven microbial retention and optional Plus+ charge for haze, color body, and endotoxin reduction.

products.title: BRHNY / BRHNY+ Series
products.summary: Bio-burden reduction nylon Plus+ membrane cartridge designed for endotoxin, haze, colloid, and microbial retention in high purity medical and pharmaceutical systems.

products.title: PSH-Series
products.summary: Hydrophobic polysulfone membrane cartridge designed for air, inert gas, and tank vent applications requiring strong moisture resistance at competitive cost.

products.title: EPTFE-Series

products.title: BRPTFE-Series

products.title: PPTFE-Series

products.title: GPFA-Series
products.summary: High purity fluoropolymer membrane cartridge designed for aggressive chemicals and semiconductor applications requiring exceptional cleanliness and chemical resistance.

products.title: HF3-Series

products.title: GSD-Series
